Modifiers are special characteristics a material can have which affect a tool's final stats. Some modifiers have restrictions, causing them to only be active in certain situations, such as when encased by another material.

== List of Modifiers ==
All modifiers have a strength value which determines how powerful its effect is.

==== <code>good_at</code> ====
Does extra damage against blocks of a certain tag.

==== <code>bad_at</code> ====
Does less damage against blocks of a certain tag.

==== <code>durable</code> ====
Increases the durability of the tool.

==== <code>fragile</code> ====
Decreases the durability of the tool.

==== <code>heavy</code> ====
Increases the swing time of the tool.

==== <code>light</code> ====
Decreases the swing time of the tool.

==== <code>powerful</code> ====
Increases the damage of the tool.

==== <code>weak</code> ====
Decreases the damage of the tool.

==== <code>single_use</code> ====

== List of Restrictions ==

==== <code>encased</code> ====

==== <code>always</code> ====

==== <code>and</code> ====

==== <code>not</code> ====

==== <code>or</code> ====
